title: The Asaba massacre and the Nigerian civil war: reclaiming hidden history
author_or_org: S. Elizabeth Bird; Fraser M. Ottanelli
pages_or_sections: Journal of Genocide Research 16(2-3): 379-399; preview lines around 183-187, 272-274, 398-400, 421-423
geographic_scope: Asaba and surrounding Midwest theater, Nigeria
strengths: Core scholarly source on Asaba with direct discussion of timing, town population uncertainty, and massacre death estimates.
limitations: Still does not provide a publishable combatant death count for the same episode frame.
notes: Best scholarly anchor for the massacre itself.

title: The Asaba Memorial Project: Negotiating a Community Collaboration
author_or_org: S. Elizabeth Bird; Fraser M. Ottanelli
strengths: Corroborates the date and the 'at least one thousand civilians' floor, and narrows town population to 20,000-30,000.
limitations: Memory-project chapter, not a battle-level military loss accounting source.
notes: Used to tighten the civilian denominator range and confirm the massacre floor.

title: Military History Lectures One & Two, Volume 1-3
author_or_org: Nigerian Army TRADOC / Chief of Army Staff
strengths: Official Nigerian military training document identifying brigades and battalions involved in the Asaba-Onitsha crossing battles.
limitations: States casualties were very high but does not quantify combatant deaths; relates more to the river crossing than the Asaba massacre window.
notes: Useful for open-problem context, not enough for a DR numerator.
